column1: # Only list pins that need a board-level alias distinct from the cpu name.
# All 96 CPU pins (PA0-PF15) are always accessible via Pin.cpu regardless.
# Prefix '-' on board_name to define the CPU pin object but omit it from
# PC13 is the PROG strap AND the 0.85V regulator feedback path.  Driving
# it LOW briefly selects boot1 on the next reset; sustained LOW can
# interfere with the regulator feedback.  machine.bootloader() uses
# pin_PC13 internally; exposed here so users can drive it deliberately.
